VX STp^rq^n W+lfl WTC 3 STO7R ^ t cTTTf^' 3 [ m U l/22/2006-3T#fo*V,fr3rrf]' MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31 st August, 2009 G.S.R. 620(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 28A of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949), the Central Government hereby further makes the following amendments in the Notification of the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, number G.S.R. 448(E) dated 28th June, 2007. 2. In the said notification, for Serial No. (6) and entries thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:— "(6) Smt. Renuka Kumar, —Member" Joint Secretary, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, 'A' Wing, Shastri Bhawan, Dr. R. P. Road, NewDelhi-110001 3. This notification shall take effect from the date of publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No. 1/22/2006-IGC/PI] AVINASH K. SRIVASTAVA,Jt.Secy. 3148 GI/2009 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
